# Database Migrations

> **Last applied:** `017_pickleball_messaging` &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Total:** 17

| # | Migration | Description |
|---|-----------|-------------|
| 001 | `001_create_profiles` | Create profiles table |
| 002 | `002_create_companies` | Create companies table |
| 003 | `003_create_conversations` | Create conversations and messages tables |
| 004 | `004_create_sessions` | Create sessions table |
| 005 | `005_create_discovery_profiles` | Create discovery_profiles table |
| 006 | `006_create_robot_catalog` | Create robot_catalog table |
| 007 | `007_create_orders` | Create orders table |
| 008 | `008_rename_conversations_user_id` | Rename conversations.user_id to profile_id for clarity |
| 009 | `009_add_cached_recommendations` | Add cached recommendations columns to discovery_profiles |
| 010 | `010_make_stripe_checkout_session_id_nullable` | Make stripe_checkout_session_id nullable to allow orders to be created |
| 011 | `011_add_test_account_flag` | Add is_test_account flag to profiles table |
| 012 | `012_create_floor_plan_analysis` | Create floor_plan_analyses table |
| 013 | `013_add_payment_pending_status` | Add 'payment_pending' status to order_status enum for ACH delayed payments |
| 014 | `014_add_gynger_to_orders` | Add Gynger financing columns to orders table |
| 015 | `015_add_purchase_price_ids` | Add Stripe purchase price IDs to robot_catalog for one-time purchase support |
| 016 | `016_enable_sessions_rls` | Enable RLS on sessions table to protect sensitive session_token column |
| 017 | `017_pickleball_messaging` | 017_pickleball_messaging.sql |


## Applying Migrations

```bash
# Apply all pending migrations
supabase db push

# Create a new migration
supabase migration new <name>
```

See [Database schema](../backend/database.md) for column-level documentation.
